intro.title: Hello, I'm Lain
intro.desc:
Robotics developer and junior undergraduate.
Currently interning at a humanoid robotics company.
Focused on MCU and Linux application development, motion control, RL deployment, and robot perception.
Email: lain-ego@qq.com

item1.title: LocoWiki Robot Locomotion Resource Hub
item1.desc: A one-stop resource hub for robot locomotion, built for ROBOCON preparation, research study, and engineering reference. It aggregates competition rules, university team technical talks, paper reading lists, and mainstream open-source project indexes, with a companion website and Feishu knowledge base.

item2.title: HTDW4438 OpenDog Quadruped
item2.desc: A full-stack open-source quadruped project spanning mechanical design, URDF modeling, Isaac Gym RL training, and sim-to-real deployment. It centers on HTDW4438-OpenDog and works together with HTDW4438-AMP, HTDW4438_HIMloco, and HTDW4438_Isaacgym as one development pipeline.

item3.title: ROBOCON 2025 Legged Robot
item3.desc: Full-stack R&D for the 2025 ROBOCON legged robot. Responsible for carbon-tube mechanical modeling, force control algorithms, and 3D LiDAR SLAM navigation. Led the team to rank 30th in Speed, 31st in Obstacle, and 34th in Cross-Country among 180+ teams.

item4.title: Bionic Lobster Submersible
item4.desc: Buoyancy-controllable multi-DOF underwater robot. Developed the control system, including stepper peristaltic pumps, motor and servo drivers, gyroscope fusion, and I2C encoder closed-loop control. Designed a vectored propulsion model for omnidirectional movement and handled driver selection and waterproofing.

item5.title: Intelligent Rice Transplanting and Harvesting Robot
item5.desc: FreeRTOS-based agricultural robot for rice transplanting and harvesting. Controlled DJI 3508 motors for gripper lifting and an omnidirectional chassis, achieving ±5 mm positioning accuracy. Participated in pneumatic design and hardware wiring, supporting dual-robot collaboration.

item6.title: SliverWolf Desktop Serial-Link Quadruped
item6.desc: A direct-drive, position-controlled serial-link quadruped using 9g micro servos. Features IMU integration, voice control, multiple gaits, and collaborative object fetching with a robotic arm.

item7.title: 3508 Legged-Robot Drive Test Platform
item7.desc: A quadruped drive solution based on DJI 3508 brushless geared motors, used in multiple ROBOCON National Competitions from 2022 to 2025.

item8.title: ROBOCON2024-PPS
item8.desc: Code repository for the ROBOCON 2024 PPS-related robot project, including competition task logic and control implementations.

event11.title: Internship at Qianxing Intelligence
event11.desc: Responsible for motion control and human-robot interaction R&D for humanoid robots.

event10.title: Launched LocoWiki Resource Hub
event10.desc: Launched the LocoWiki resource hub for robot competition preparation, research learning, and development reference, bringing together competition rules, technical sharing, paper reading lists, and high-quality open-source projects in one place.

event1.title: Open-Sourced SliverWolf Desktop Serial-Link Quadruped
event1.desc: Released SliverWolf, a desktop serial-link quadruped robot featuring voice control and robotic-arm collaboration.

event2.title: 2024 ROBOCON National Competition
event2.desc: Developed the embedded control system for the R1 robot based on FreeRTOS, achieving ±5mm positioning accuracy, ball launching, and gripper functionalities.

event3.title: 2024 Fujian Undergraduate Electronics Design Contest
event3.desc: Developed an autonomous driving car system based on the MSPM0G3507, qualifying for the provincial testing stage.

event4.title: Fujian Intelligent Marine Equipment Design Competition
event4.desc: Led control-system development for a buoyancy-controllable multi-DOF lobster-inspired underwater robot, winning the Grand Prize.

event5.title: 2024 World Marine Equipment Conference
event5.desc: Represented Fujian University of Technology as an exhibitor, showcasing the bionic lobster robot; covered by media outlets including Xinhua News Agency.

event6.title: 2025 ROBOCON National Competition
event6.desc: Responsible for full-stack R&D of the legged robot. Ranked 30th nationally in the Speed Race, 31st in the Obstacle Race, and 34th in the Cross-Country Race, securing National Second Prize in all three categories.

event7.title: 2025 National Undergraduate Electronics Design Contest
event7.desc: Responsible for the hardware design and fabrication of the power meter for an automatic ranging system, winning the National Second Prize.

event8.title: Open-Sourced BRS Parallel-Link Quadruped Robot
event8.desc: Open-sourced the mechanical structure and control code of the BRS parallel-link quadruped robot on GitHub.

event9.title: Internship at HighTorque Robotics
event9.desc: Responsible for mechanical design, control algorithm development, and system integration testing for the HTDW4438 bionic quadruped robot, covering both open-source and productized versions.
